name: Wheel Synchron
name_jp: ホイール・シンクロン
desc: If this card you control is used as Synchro Material, you can treat it as a non-Tuner. You can only use each of the following effects of "Wheel Synchron" once per turn. During your Main Phase, you can: Immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 Level 4 or lower monster, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Synchro Monsters. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Synchro Monster you control; reduce its Level by up to 4.
mnst_eff: If this card you control is used as Synchro Material, you can treat it as a non-Tuner. You can only use each of the following effects of "Wheel Synchron" once per turn. During your Main Phase, you can: Immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 Level 4 or lower monster, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Synchro Monsters. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Synchro Monster you control; reduce its Level by up to 4.
eff: If this card you control is used as Synchro Material, you can treat it as a non-Tuner. You can only use each of the following effects of "Wheel Synchron" once per turn. During your Main Phase, you can: Immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 Level 4 or lower monster, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Synchro Monsters. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Synchro Monster you control; reduce its Level by up to 4.

stat_change: Treats itself as a non-Tuner monster
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
